description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-card

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-card` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] Consider adding `role="region"` or `role="article"` for cards used as standalone content blocks
- [ ] The `clickable` variant needs keyboard activation tests (Enter/Space)
- [ ] Footer slot alignment could use flex gap tokens instead of margin
- [ ] Drupal Twig template example needed in docs

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817623111-5xss2g4h8`
title: Post-Audit: hx-card — follow-up items

## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-card

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-card` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] Consider adding `role="region"` or `role="article"` for cards used as standalone content blocks
- [ ] The `clickable` variant needs keyboard activation tests (Enter/Space)
- [ ] Footer slot alignment could use flex gap tokens instead of margin
- [ ] Drupal Twig template example needed in docs

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817623111-5xss2g4h8`
